name: CLAHE Contrast Enhancement Comparison
description: Perform advanced local contrast enhancement on the 'Embryos (42K)' microscopy sample image. Apply Contrast-Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) to the image to reveal local details. Create a side-by-side comparison montage showing the original image on the left and the enhanced version on the right. Save the final montage as a PNG file to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/clahe_comparison.png'.
